title: Amethyst Ender Pearl
description: Ender Pearl as a soft amethyst star with golden edges
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa62d4dd1acbd6d77b66bdbd3d9a32a8d12e997a.png) *** _Made at the request of **triaxyz**. Want to make a pack suggestion? **Visit my server!**_
### **Features:**
Well, just replaces ender pearl by cute star, nothing else Maintains vanilla-friendly style while adding fantasy charm
*** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
